pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and setup_artifactory.sh which configure the repository and deploy the test artifact to it.
Confirmed by setup_task.sh script which deploys the downloaded jar to this specific path.
Corroborated by task.json description and setup_task.sh which explicitly cleans up this file.
Found in setup_artifactory.sh which initializes the Artifactory instance.
Found in setup_artifactory.sh which initializes the Artifactory instance.
Confirmed by setup_artifactory.sh which configures Docker to map Artifactory UI to this URL.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires finding the SHA-256 checksum of the 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' artifact within a local JFrog Artifactory instance running at http://localhost:8082. The artifact is genuinely downloaded from Maven Central and deployed to the 'example-repo-local' repository at 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. The expected correct SHA-256 checksum for this real Maven artifact was independently verified as '7b96bf3ee68949abb5bc465559ac270e0551596fa34523fddf890ec418dde13c'.
